{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Master of the Labyrinth
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Master of the Labyrinth]] is mentioned as someone who could quiet squires in a duel.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Master of the Labyrinth]] is located above the [[labyrinth]]'s heart.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
